notes: All 8 sites returned HTTP 403 to the automated WebFetch checker (bot-blocking headers). Sites are likely up; 403 indicates the automated crawler was refused, not that the origin is down. SSL certs expiring 2026-06-01 (29 days) remain the confirmed alert — all domains share the same expiry, consistent with Vercel/Let's Encrypt auto-renewal cycle. Second consecutive day at 29-day threshold; renewal may not have fired yet.
